stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the variation of wind with height?

options.a: The wind normally backs during climb out through the first 2000-3000 feet in the northern hemisphere.
options.b: The wind strength normally increases by a factor of 2 per 1000 feet up to the 850 hPa level.
options.c: The wind normally veers during climb out through the first 2000-3000 feet in the northern hemisphere.
options.d: The wind strength normally increases by a factor of 2 per 500 feet up to the 700 hPa level.
